original_intent: Fix the percentage-sum rounding defect in SentimentAggregator.compute_market_sentiment() so that bullish_pct + bearish_pct + neutral_pct always equals 100.0
goal_conditions: GC-1: compute_market_sentiment() returns bullish_pct + bearish_pct + neutral_pct == 100.0 for any non-empty ticker list
GC-2: The fix applies to the independent-rounding defect — neutral_pct must be derived as the residual (100.0 - bullish_pct - bearish_pct) rather than computed and rounded independently
GC-3: The empty-ticker edge case continues to return all three percentages as 0.0
GC-4: No other methods in the file are modified
GC-5: All existing tests that import sentiment_aggregator continue to pass
risk_justification: Single arithmetic expression change in one private method. No new dependencies. Semantically equivalent for passing cases; strictly corrects failing 1/3-1/3-1/3 split case. Rollback is one git checkout.
